Project: Cobtool
Status: VERIFIED static browser-only operational worktool for collections and finance operations.

Permanent operating layer
- Read `AGENTS.md` first.
- Read `skills/00-skill-index.md` next.
- Read `docs/execution/00-execution-index.md` and `docs/execution/11-codex-default-operating-sequence.md` before implementation work.
- Always apply:
  - `skills/01-repo-identity-skill.md`
  - `skills/02-github-pages-skill.md`
- Then apply task-specific skills:
  - storage/state: `skills/03-persistence-skill.md`
  - backup/restore/payloads: `skills/04-import-export-skill.md`
  - PDFs/templates/boleto parsing: `skills/05-pdf-and-document-skill.md`
  - operator gate/scoped behavior: `skills/06-operator-session-skill.md`
  - routes/DOM/modals: `skills/07-ui-navigation-skill.md`
  - feature work: `skills/08-feature-implementation-skill.md`
  - verification: `skills/09-regression-skill.md`
  - refactor/extraction: `skills/10-modularization-skill.md`
- Use `docs/execution/01-module-priority-matrix.md` to classify risk before coding.
- Use `docs/execution/02-feature-intake-template.md` to scope future features.
- Use `docs/execution/08-regression-matrix.md` to select minimum verification.

Operating layer roles
- `AGENTS.md`: hard constraints and mandatory posture
- `skills/`: topical routing
- `docs/execution/`: implementation action system
- `docs/`: canonical detailed maps and contracts

Summary
- Entry point: `index.html`
- Main runtime: `script.js`
- Styling: `style.css`
- Local assets: notification templates, Calibri font files, operator payload stubs
- Deployment: static copy to GitHub Pages via `.github/workflows/pages-from-release.yml`
- No backend, no database, no required server runtime

What Cobtool is not
- Not a marketing site
- Not a server-backed CRUD app
- Not a database-backed system
- Not an API-first architecture

Core constraints
- Must remain fully functional on GitHub Pages
- Must remain browser-local and file-based for persistence
- Do not add server-only dependencies
- Do not move core logic to APIs or databases
- Do not break operator scoping, import/export, PDF flows, or local-first recovery

Major modules
- App shell and navigation
- Operator session gate
- Alfa cobranca workspace
- Formatting tools
- Compensation engine
- Client registry
- Network registry
- Negotiations
- Transfers plus PIX proofs
- Boleto issuance logging
- Boleto metadata registry and parser
- Contact record helper
- Unified backup and import
- PDF letter and document generators

Major pages and routes
- `operator-unlock` -> `page-operator-unlock`
- `home` -> `page-home`
- `menu-esfera` -> `page-menu-esfera`
- `menu-cadastro` -> `page-menu-cadastro`
- `menu-formatacao` -> `page-menu-formatacao`
- `menu-cartas` -> `page-menu-cartas`
- `alfa` -> `page-alfa`
- `negociacoes` -> `page-neg-menu`
- `neg-cadastro` -> `page-neg-cadastro`
- `redes` -> `page-redes`
- `neg-cad-negociacoes` -> `page-neg-cad-negociacoes`
- `neg-andamento` -> `page-neg-andamento`
- `neg-finalizadas` -> `page-neg-finalizadas`
- `neg-canceladas` -> `page-neg-canceladas`
- `compensacoes` -> `page-compensacoes`
- `transferencias` -> `page-transferencias`
- `tr-andamento` -> `page-tr-andamento`
- `tr-finalizadas` -> `page-tr-finalizadas`
- `notificacao-extrajudicial` -> `page-notificacao-extrajudicial`
- `carta-cobranca` -> `page-carta-cobranca`
- `carta-quitacao` -> `page-carta-quitacao`
- `registro-boletos` -> `page-registro-boletos`
- `emissao-boletos` -> `page-emissao-boletos`
- `registro-contato` -> `page-registro-contato`
- `import-export` -> `page-import-export`

Major entities
- Client: id, razaoSocial, codigoCliente, cnpj, responsavel, contato, created and updated timestamps
- Network: id, nome, clientes[]
- Negotiation: client or rede snapshots, values, parcelas, status, textoNegociacao, parcelasPagas[]
- Transfer: id, codigo, cnpj, valorCentavos, client snapshot fields, status flags, createdAt
- PIX proof record: id, codigo, cnpj, valor, filename, storedAt, blob
- PIX row state: codigo, cnpj, valor, email, creditado, compensacao, finalizado
- Boleto metadata row: cnpj, notaFiscal, parcela, emissao, vencto, identificador, valor, codigoBarras, nome, data, hora, operador
- Boleto issuance request: tipo, nome or idLogin or email or telefone or estado, quantidade, meta, quais, createdAt

Storage rules
- Global keys:
  - `ch_theme`
  - `ct_message_counter_v1`
  - `cobtool_alfa_operador_v1`
  - `cobtool_operator_session_v1`
  - `ch_last_page`
- Operator-scoped keys use suffix `__<operator-slug>` via `cobtoolScopedStorageKey(...)`
- Main operator-scoped stores:
  - `cobtool_clientes_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_redes_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_negociacoes_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_transferencias_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_pix_state_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_alfa_ufs_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_emissao_boletos_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_registro_contato_v1__<slug>`
  - `cobtool_representantes_v1__<slug>` is `INFERRED` as a consumed lookup store
- IndexedDB:
  - DB `cobtool_pix_db_v1`
  - store `pix_store`

Import and export contracts
- Full backup payloadType: `cobtool_backup_v2`
- Operator payloadType: `cobtool_operator_data_v1`
- Boleto metadata payloadType: `cobtool_registro_boletos_metadados_v1`
- Full backup includes raw localStorage dump plus normalized entities, UI snapshot, and PIX files
- Operator import merges only keys ending with the imported operator suffix
- Legacy import branch for older PIX backup shape still exists

Fragile areas
- `pages`, `PAGE_PARENT`, and `pageIds`
- Operator slugging and scoped storage logic
- Backup import path that clears and rewrites `localStorage`
- PIX dual persistence: `localStorage` row state plus `IndexedDB` blobs
- Negotiation semantics and compensation coupling
- Transfer-to-negotiation matching by code and CNPJ
- Boleto PDF parsing heuristics
- Notification and letter template filenames, anchor strings, and offset constants
- Global bridges:
  - `window.__cobtoolRegistroBoletosExtractBarcode`
  - `window.__cobtoolTransferenciasRefresh`
  - `window.ctMessageCounter`

Implementation rules
- Prefer additive changes inside existing modules before adding new pages
- Read `docs/execution/` before implementation or risky change
- If adding a page, update HTML section plus `pages`, `PAGE_PARENT`, and `pageIds` as needed
- New durable operator-owned data should use `cobtoolScopedStorageKey('cobtool_<domain>_v1')`
- New durable data must be considered for full backup export and import
- Do not rename storage keys, route keys, DOM ids, or payloadType values without migration or compatibility handling
- Do not alter PDF or document flows without generating outputs and testing parsing
- Update `docs/`, `docs/execution/`, `AGENTS.md` when operating rules change, and `public/llms.txt` whenever entities, storage, routes, payloads, or process-critical guidance changes
